channel.title: Create TCGUI VM :: SE How-To Build Lab
channel.description: If you receive an error No route to host with any of the following steps, use the Troubleshoot Ansible steps from Terminal in OOB ​ RDP to OOB cd /home/fortinet/automation/ansible/ubuntu ​ RDP to OOB ./create_tcgui.sh ../vars/all-hosts.yml <PVE server name> ubuntu_tcgui ​ RDP to OOB ./start_stop_remove_vm.sh ../vars/all-hosts.yml <PVE server name> ubuntu_tcgui started
